response:
If your IT admin removed your seat, they will need to reassign it to you in the organization settings. Here's how they can restore your access:

1. Go to **[Organization settings > Organization](https://claude.ai/admin-settings/organization)**
2. Find your user in the member list
3. Select "Enterprise seat" from the **Seat Type** dropdown

This will immediately restore your access. As a non-admin user, you'll need to coordinate with your organization's Owner or Admin to have them perform these steps.

Sources: [https://support.claude.com/en/team-and-enterprise-plans/admin-management/13133750-manage-members-on-team-and-enterprise-plans.md](https://support.claude.com/en/team-and-enterprise-plans/admin-management/13133750-manage-members-on-team-and-enterprise-plans.md), [https://support.claude.com/en/team-and-enterprise-plans/admin-management/13393991-purchase-and-manage-seats-on-enterprise-plans.md](https://support.claude.com/en/team-and-enterprise-plans/admin-management/13393991-purchase-and-manage-seats-on-enterprise-plans.md)

If you believe the merchant has sent the wrong product and is not responding, you can:  
1. **Report the issue** using Visa's [online form](https://usa.visa.com/Forms/visa-rules.html) to escalate the dispute.  
2. **Contact your Visa card issuer directly** (not Visa) to initiate a refund or chargeback process, as they manage your account.  

Visa cannot "ban" merchants, but reporting the issue may trigger internal reviews by Visa or the payment network. For urgent assistance, also reach out to your card issuer’s customer service.  

Sources: [Support](https://www.visa.co.in/support/support.md), [Visa Rules](https://www.visa.co.in/support/support/consumer/visa-rules.md)

response:
To remove an interviewer from an interview template, follow these steps:  

1. Navigate to **Interviews > Templates**.  
2. Click the **More options (⋮)** menu next to the relevant template.  
3. Select **Share**.  
4. In the **Share Interview Template** dialog, choose the user or team you want to remove.  
5. Click **Remove User** from the drop-down menu.  

This process removes their access to the specific template. If you're working within an active interview session instead of a template, this option may not be available—ensure you're editing the template settings.  

Sources: [https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/interviews/manage-interviews/2837093779-standardizing-interviews-using-templates.md](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/interviews/manage-interviews/2837093779-standardizing-interviews-using-templates.md)

response:
To pause your HackerRank subscription, follow these steps:  

1. **Check Eligibility**:  
   - Ensure your subscription is active for at least 30 days (including a 7-day grace period for late payments).  
   - Confirm you have a **monthly subscription** (e.g., Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly).  

2. **Pause Subscription**:  
   - Click your **profile icon** → **Settings** → **Billing** under the **Subscription** section.  
   - Follow the prompts to **Confirm Pause**. A confirmation message will display the pause duration and automatic resume date.  

3. **Note**: During the paused period, you won’t be able to access your account.  

If you encounter issues, contact [support@hackerrank.com](mailto:support@hackerrank.com) for assistance.  

Sources: [Pause Subscription](https://support.hackerrank.com/articles/5157311476-pause-subscription)

response:
If Claude is completely unresponsive and all requests are failing, this may be due to **system-wide capacity constraints** (temporary high demand) or a **service incident**. Here's how to proceed:

- Check [status.claude.com](https://status.claude.com) to confirm if there's an active service disruption.
- If no incident is reported, capacity constraints may be causing delays. Try again in a few minutes, as these issues typically resolve as demand fluctuates.

> **Note:** Capacity constraints are temporary and not classified as outages. The system remains operational but manages high user demand.

Sources: [https://support.claude.com/en/claude/troubleshooting/12466728-troubleshoot-claude-error-messages.md](https://support.claude.com/en/claude/troubleshooting/12466728-troubleshoot-claude-error-messages.md)

If your name is incorrect on your HackerRank certificate, you can update it yourself following these steps:  

1. **Log in** to the same HackerRank Community account used to complete the assessment.  
2. Navigate to your **certificate page**.  
3. In the **Full Name** field, enter the corrected name.  
4. Click **Regenerate Certificate** and confirm by clicking **Update Name** in the dialog.  

**Important Notes**:  
- This change applies to **all your certificates** associated with the account.  
- You can only update the name **once** per account.  

If you still don’t see the updated certificate after completing these steps, ensure you’ve passed the test and allow a few minutes for the update to reflect.  

Sources: [https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/hackerrank_community/certifications/8941367927-certifications-faqs.md](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/hackerrank_community/certifications/8941367927-certifications-faqs.md)

response:
Pour empêcher Claude de crawler votre site web, voici les étapes à suivre :

- **Méthode recommandée** :  
  Ajoutez les lignes suivantes à votre fichier `robots.txt` (disponible à la racine de votre site) :  
  ```
  User-agent: ClaudeBot  
  Disallow: /
  ```  
  Cela bloque l'accès de ClaudeBot à l'ensemble de votre site. Répétez cette configuration pour chaque sous-domaine souhaité.

- **Option complémentaire** :  
  Vous pouvez également utiliser la directive `Crawl-delay` pour limiter la fréquence des crawls (exemple : `Crawl-delay: 1`), toujours dans le fichier `robots.txt`.

- **Contacter Anthropic** :  
  Si vous rencontrez des problèmes ou souhaitez vérifier que les crawls sont bien arrêtés, contactez [claudebot@anthropic.com](mailto:claudebot@anthropic.com) depuis une adresse email liée à votre domaine.

> ⚠️ **Ne bloquez pas les adresses IP directement** : Cela empêcherait Anthropic de lire votre fichier `robots.txt`, rendant l'opt-out impossible.  
> Liste des IPs d'Anthropic : [https://claude.com/crawling/bots.json](https://claude.com/crawling/bots.json)

Sources : [https://support.claude.com/en/privacy-and-legal/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler.md](https://support.claude.com/en/privacy-and-legal/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler.md)

Para remover a un empleado de su cuenta de contratación en HackerRank, siga estos pasos:

1. **Inicie sesión como Administrador de la empresa** en HackerRank.
2. Vaya a la **página de Candidatos**.
3. **Busque al empleado** que desea eliminar.
4. Haga clic en la opción **Eliminar**.

Tenga en cuenta que esto eliminará permanentemente el perfil del candidato de su cuenta.
